{{CargoRelic
|name=Divergence Meter
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=03-27
|source=Lottery Machine (0.36%), Wishing (13.2%), Time Chest (2%), Novice Scrolls (5%)
|description=On Mar 27, 2035, Dr. James developed this device that can tell the world line you are in.

The Divergence Meter can display the changes of the world lines. Most people lost their memories created in the previous world line whenever there is a chance. But with this detector, the location of the world lines can be recorded. Typically, world lines will change only when somebody travels through time.

[Parts of the Meter]

Host: Divergence Meter. Remote Control: Infrared. USB: 2A High current. Cable: LG micro USB. Charging cable: USB-DC
|fame=23
|art=24
|fth=28
|civ=33
|tech=46
|ss1=In explorations, B-tads gained +0.4%
|ss2=In explorations, B-tads gained +0.8%
|ss3=In explorations, B-tads gained +1.2%
|ss4=In explorations, B-tads gained +2%
|ss7=In explorations, B-tads gained +2%<br>In explorations, B-tads gained +2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill I.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Time Machine Max Cap +5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Blue TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Skill]]
[[Category:Time Machine Output Boost]]
[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Mechanic Boost]]
[[Category:NeuroMecha Minion Boost]]
